# Pinned dependencies for the Local LLM Question Log.
# Discipline: every `pip install <pkg>` must be preceded by adding the
# pinned line here, then `pip install -r requirements.txt`.
# Never `pip install` ad-hoc and forget to record it.

fastapi==0.115.*
uvicorn[standard]==0.32.*
jinja2==3.1.*
httpx==0.27.*
psycopg[binary]==3.2.*
python-dotenv==1.0.*
